holdings.infoBox: FDTS is an equity ETF with a total of 416 individual holdings. The top holdings are SHINSEGAE stock at 0.97%, Jeju Semiconductor at 0.88%, TSE Co., Ltd at 0.72%, Korea Circuit at 0.72%, and DAEDUCK ELECTRONICS at 0.68%.

overview.description: The First Trust Developed Markets ex-US Small Cap AlphaDEX Fund (FDTS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ AlphaDEX DM Ex-US Small Cap index. The fund tracks a tiered equal-weighted index of 400 small-cap companies selected from the S&P Developed Markets ex-US BMI based on S&P's AlphaDex selection methodology. FDTS was launched on Feb 15, 2012 and is issued by First Trust.
infoTable: NASDAQ AlphaDEX DM Ex-US Small Cap Index
